properties.Test Case: Make sure letter combinations work, especially diagraphs.
properties.Steps: - Make sure letter combinations work, especially diagraphs.

properties.Test Case: Turn on/off Decodable Reader switch (BL-12594). Markup on the page you are editing to refresh accordingly. Confirm that the setting in either state gets saved.
properties.Steps: Turn on/off Decodable Reader switch (BL-12594). Markup on the page you are editing to refresh accordingly. Confirm that the setting in either state gets saved.

properties.Test Case: Format text -- bold, italitc, underline -- and ensure formatting does not affect statistics.
properties.Steps: Format text -- bold, italitc, underline -- and ensure formatting does not affect statistics.

properties.Test Case: Make a new Leveled Reader book from one of the templates from the BloomPack. Should start on the correct level, with correct toolbox tool showing. (JT: as of 6/30/23, the one called LR1: Levels 1-3 Word Lengths opens at level 2; the one called LR2: Level 4-6 Words in Sentences opens at level 6. I'm not sure that's what the author of the bloompack intended, but I think it's enough to show that the template is controlling the initial level.)
